title.en: Non-volatile erasable programmable read-only memory media sanitisation

group-parts.group: Non-volatile erasable programmable read-only memory media sanitisation
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en: When sanitising non-volatile erasable programmable read-only memory (EPROM), three times the manufacturer’s specification for ultraviolet erasure time should be applied to provide additional certainty in sanitisation processes. Subsequently, the non-volatile EPROM media should be overwritten at least once in its entirety with a random pattern followed by a read back for verification.
